channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Trump holds prayer rally to ‘rededicate’ US as ‘one nation under God’
item.description: Critics have denounced the event as a blurring of the separation of church and state mandated by the US Constitution.

item.title: ‘Won’t be anything left’: Trump issues threat to Iran amid stalled talks
item.description: The US president has pressured Iran to concede to demands including dismantling nuclear programme and missile stocks.

item.title: Israel kills at least five in Lebanon after ‘ceasefire’ extended
item.description: At least five people have been killed in Israeli air attacks on several locations in southern and eastern Lebanon.

item.title: DRC struggling to contain Ebola outbreak as cases spread
item.description: The Democratic Republic of Congo has faced repeated Ebola outbreaks.

item.title: Will the latest Ebola outbreak in DR Congo and Uganda spread further?
item.description: The World Health Organization declares the epidemic a global health emergency.

item.title: Mexican officials announce 10 dead in early-morning shooting in Tehuitzingo
item.description: Officials blamed the shooting on 'armed individuals', though no details were provided about attackers or their motives.

item.title: Israel kills three Palestinians in strike on an aid kitchen in Gaza
item.description: Israel bombed a kitchen that provided meals to the displaced in Gaza, killing three and injuring others.

item.title: Peruvian authorities confirm Fujimori and Sanchez advance to runoff
item.description: Candidates will face off on June 7 election after first round of voting marred by logistical errors, fraud allegations.

item.title: France listening to 10 ‘new’ suspected victims of Epstein: Prosecutor
item.description: French magistrates investigate possible offences involving French perpetrators who facilitated Jeffrey Epstein's crimes.

item.title: Sudanese army advances in Blue Nile state deepen displacement crisis
item.description: The Sudanese army has made advances in Blue Nile state, with renewed fighting forcing families into overcrowded camps

item.title: Italy’s leaders visit victims of Modena car-ramming, stabbing attacks
item.description: The attacks carried out by 31-year-old Salim El Khoudri appear related 'to a situation of psychiatric distress'.

item.title: Three community kitchen workers among eight killed by Israel in Gaza
item.description: Israeli attacks on Gaza have killed at least 871 Palestinians since the so-called ceasefire started last year.

item.title: Canadian FM: Is the US still a reliable ally?
item.description: Anita Anand discusses Donald Trump, NATO, Israel, China and Canada’s international role.

item.title: DRC faces deadly Ebola resurgence amid worsening humanitarian crisis
item.description: The new Ebola outbreak has been reported in the towns of Rwampara, Mongwalu, and Bunia in northeastern DRC

item.title: Iranian civilians get defence training
item.description: Defence training sessions on light weapons were held for Iranian men and women in mosques in several cities.

item.title: US college graduates face harsh job market amid economic uncertainty
item.description: Gov't funding cuts, war, tariffs and AI advancements intensify competition among recent graduates seeking stable jobs.

item.title: Taiwan not to give up ‘free way of life under pressure’: President
item.description: Lai says Taiwan will not provoke conflict with China, but will not forsake its dignity or democratic values.

item.title: What to know about Panama at the FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Panama are World Cup-bound for a second time in eight years, but in 2026, they're not there to just make up the numbers.

item.title: What to know about Georgia’s primary as Republicans set sights on Senate
item.description: Republicans hope to reclaim Ossoff's Senate seat after 2020 upset; Democrats will pick champion for governor's race.

item.title: Is Christian Zionism in the US on a decline?
item.description: Support for Israel among young American conservatives is weakening. That might not bode well for Christian Zionism.

item.title: Fabio Di Giannantonio wins shortened Catalan MotoGP after Marquez crash
item.description: Race marred by two red flags and multiple crashes, including a serious incident involving Alex Marquez and Pedro Acosta.

item.title: Drone strike sparks fire on perimeter of UAE’s Barakah nuclear power plant
item.description: Authorities say radiation levels remain normal, operations not affected.

item.title: Son of Palestinian President Mahmoud Abbas elected to top Fatah body
item.description: Businessman Yasser Abbas, 64, secured a place on the central committee despite spending most of his time in Canada.

item.title: How will Izz al-Din al-Haddad assassination impact Hamas’s Gaza operations?
item.description: Israel's killing of Hamas's top commander Izz al-Din al-Haddad tests the Gaza ceasefire as the group pledges to adapt.

item.title: New wave of Israeli strikes pound Lebanon despite ceasefire
item.description: New wave of Israeli strikes pound Lebanon despite ceasefire
